channel.title: Faceprint | The Banner Factory | Home of 24Hr Banners
channel.description: 24Hr | Same day Printing | Best Prices Guaranteed

wp:author.wp:author_display_name: FacePrint HQ | 5 Beacon St | Maboneng | Johannesburg
wp:author.wp:author_first_name: FacePrint HQ | 5 Beacon St | Maboneng | Johannesburg

image.title: Faceprint | The Banner Factory | Home of 24Hr Banners

item.title: Formulate Plus
item.dc:creator: George
item.excerpt:encoded: Printed sail flag for outdoor use. Robust flag pole with printed flag. Will withstand windspeeds of up to 31mph. Outdoor storm flag in choice of heights.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Burgon-Parr";s:6:"camera";s:14:"Canon EOS 500D";s:7:"caption";s:153:"Printed sail flag for outdoor use. Outdoor storm flag in choice of heights.";s:17:"created_timestamp";s:10:"1430821200";s:9:"copyright";s:20:"©XL Displays Ltd UK";s:12:"focal_length";s:2:"18";s:3:"iso";s:3:"400";s:13:"shutter_speed";s:17:"0.016666666666667";s:5:"title";s:14:"Formulate Plus";s:11:"orientation";s:1:"1";s:8:"keywords";a:5:{i:0;s:10:"storm flag";i:1;s:13:"straight flag";i:2;s:14:"rectangle flag";i:3;s:9:"sail flag";i:4;s:13:"outdoor flags";}}}
